note: This manifest file's own git blob necessarily predates the commit that adds it, so it cannot self-report its own finalization commit hash without amending after the fact (which this project's git discipline avoids). The finalization commit hash is recorded in docs/39_Tag_Readiness_v2.5.0-rc1.md's companion Step 18 final report and is the commit the v2.5.0-rc1 tag points at.

security.secret_scan: clean (no API keys, passwords, SMTP credentials, webhook secrets, bearer tokens, or private keys found in tracked files)

supported_execution_interfaces: CLI (python -m src.ui.cli, monitoring_cli, notification_cli, feedback_cli, discovery_cli)
Web dashboard (Flask, server-rendered, localhost by default)
JSON API v1 (/api/v1/*, consumed by the same web dashboard's own JS and available to any local HTTP client)
fixture_tested_capabilities: Search pipeline (discovery, connectors, analysis, filtering, geo enrichment, ranking, reporting) against demo_platform/demo_platform_two
Automatic platform discovery against a fake page fetcher
Continuous monitoring and change detection against deterministic fixture reruns
Notification delivery (console/file channels) against synthetic and real pipeline-recorded events
live_tested_capabilities: Web dashboard and JSON API (real Flask app, real facade calls, real SQLite database)
CLI startup and search execution against real Playwright-rendered local fixture pages
Backup creation, checksum verification, and restore (real SQLite online backup API)
Installation health check against the real local environment
production_provider_dependencies: RentCast (requires RENTCAST_API_KEY; the one real, non-demo data connector)
Email notification channel (requires real SMTP credentials)
Webhook notification channel (requires a real webhook URL and signing secret)
Ollama AI provider (requires a locally running Ollama server; null/no-op provider is the default fallback)
known_limitations: walking_distance/public_transport_time filters are a normalized 0.0-1.0 proximity score, not literal minutes (docs/33 Known Gaps #1)
A filter-value validation error surfaces as a job's error_summary string, not an immediate form-level 400 (docs/33 Known Gaps #2)
property_type filtering cannot be meaningfully exercised against demo connector fixtures; only RentCast populates that field (docs/33 Known Gaps #3)
new_match/new_listing monitoring events require a second observation of a saved search before they can occur (docs/33 Known Gaps #4)
No commercial rental platform (Zillow, Apartments.com, Rightmove, Idealista, Fotocasa, ImmoScout24, etc.) has a real connector in this release
No config-file loader exists; config/pilot.example.json is a documented reference for manual entry into the web form or CLI flags
